products.menuLine: Dalmore 12 Year · Highland, Scotland · $75 · 86 proof (43.0% ABV) · Notes: orange marmalade, chocolate

guidance.bestFor: Sherry Scotch, orange note request, classic lounge pairing.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when orange and chocolate in Scotch should echo a maduro — marmalade, sherry, cocoa.
guidance.memberBlurb: Dalmore 12 — orange marmalade and sherry over chocolate and oak. The Highland Scotch cigar bars have loved for decades.

products.menuLine: Diplomático Reserva Exclusiva · Venezuela · $42 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: brown sugar, orange

guidance.bestFor: Cigar-first pairing, rum curious member, dessert-profile spirit.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants dry agricole rhum or zero sweetness.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when cigar pairing is the goal — brown sugar, orange, molasses, and chocolate beside maduro.
guidance.memberBlurb: Diplomático Reserva Exclusiva — orange peel and toffee over fudge, dark chocolate, and dried fruit. Brand-official cigar-pairing rum.

products.menuLine: Don Julio 1942 · Jalisco, Mexico · $175 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: caramel, vanilla

guidance.bestFor: Tequila prestige request, 1942 by name, celebratory cigar night.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants blanco/mezcal smoke or budget under $80.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member names 1942 or wants celebratory tequila — caramel, vanilla, and roasted agave.
guidance.memberBlurb: Don Julio 1942 — caramel, vanilla, and roasted agave in the pour everyone requests at the lounge. Have an answer ready.

products.menuLine: Del Maguey Vida Mezcal · Oaxaca, Mexico · $38 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: smoke, roasted agave

guidance.bestFor: Mezcal curious, smoky pairing, agave explorer.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member is ready for mezcal — smoke, roasted agave, and citrus beside earthy cigars.
guidance.memberBlurb: Del Maguey Vida — espadín mezcal with smoke and roasted agave. The mezcal pour that teaches the category without boutique pricing.

products.menuLine: Don Julio Reposado · Jalisco, Mexico · $55 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: cooked agave, vanilla

guidance.bestFor: Member moving from cocktails to sipping tequila, medium-full cigar night.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants only blanco crispness or ultra-luxury 1942.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants Don Julio character below 1942 — vanilla, oak, and agave for sipping.
guidance.memberBlurb: Don Julio Reposado — the tequila people buy twice. Vanilla and oak over cooked agave when someone is done with shots and ready to sip.

products.menuLine: D'USSÉ VSOP Cognac · Cognac, France · $50 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: dried fruit, honey

guidance.bestFor: Cognac curious, Jay-Z brand recognition, medium-full cigar.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when cognac is cultural shorthand but XO is too much — honey, fruit, and oak.
guidance.memberBlurb: D'USSÉ VSOP — honey and dried fruit in the cognac brand lounges hear about from culture, not just connoisseurs.

products.menuLine: Eagle Rare Kentucky Straight Bourbon · Kentucky · $35 · 90 proof (45% ABV) · Journey: Intermediate · Notes: leather, orange peel

guidance.bestFor: Member wants refined bourbon without Pappy pricing, citrus-leather cigar pairing.
guidance.avoidIf: User demands cask-strength only or Islay smoke.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants elegant bourbon — leather, orange peel, and polished oak.
guidance.memberBlurb: Eagle Rare 10 — toffee, orange peel, and leather over candied almonds and cocoa. Official BT ten-year profile without collector hype.

products.menuLine: Elijah Craig Small Batch · Kentucky · $30 · 94 proof (47.0% ABV) · Journey: Intermediate · Notes: caramel, vanilla

guidance.bestFor: Value-premium bourbon, everyday pour, balanced cigar night.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants peat or tequila only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend as reliable small-batch bourbon — caramel, spice, and oak at fair price.
guidance.memberBlurb: Elijah Craig Small Batch — caramel and baking spice from a heritage Kentucky name. Honest bourbon that works every night beside a cigar.
